editorial_accuracy.notes: Unchanged. 133 evidence blocks, all sources clean.

information_design.notes: 30 hero images verified. Dark mode image treatment active. Print styles comprehensive.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Run 17: Full mobile responsive pass — 44px touch targets across all interactive elements, intermediate sm breakpoints on all grids, responsive typography scaling. Run 18: no new UI changes.

code_quality.notes: GA4 share tracking added to FloatingShareBar with contentId prop. Express compression middleware reduces transfer ~66%. Immutable cache headers on hashed static assets. Build clean, zero TS errors.

accessibility.notes: Run 17: All interactive elements meet 44px minimum touch targets (Apple HIG/WCAG). Evidence tiers have text + color + icons. Skip link. Focus rings. prefers-reduced-motion. Keyboard nav on share menu.

security.notes: CSP img-src now includes upload.wikimedia.org for 30 hero images. unsafe-inline in script-src for GA4 inline config. Cache-Control: no-cache on HTML prevents stale SPA shell.
